content.problemStatement:
Chef wants to gift C chocolates to Botswal on his birthday. \
However, he has only X chocolates with him. \
The cost of 1 chocolate is Y rupees. 

Find the minimum money in rupees Chef needs to spend so that he can gift C chocolates to Botswal.
content.inputFormat: - Each test case contains of a single line of input, three integers C,X, and Y.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output in a single line answer, the minimum money in rupees Chef needs to spend.

sampleTestCases.explanation: Chef has to gift a total of 7 chocolates out of which he has 5 chocolates. Thus, Chef needs to buy 2 more chocolates, which costs him 10 rupees.
Chef has to gift a total of 10 chocolates out of which he has 1 chocolate. Thus, Chef needs to buy 9 more chocolates, which costs him 9 rupees.
